Asset id: ai_hero_background
Asset kind and role: background_image / hero
Target UI element: section1
Purpose: Create visual depth for the primary page region
Composition brief: A low-contrast contextual background with generous negative space for readable interface text
Required pixel size: 1440x720px
Aspect ratio token: wide
Nearby UI text context: Laptop Product Introduction | Key Features | Explore the main features that make this laptop ideal for office use. | Powerful Intel Core i7 processor for smooth multitasking and performance. | 16GB RAM to handle multiple office applications efficiently. | 512GB SSD for fast data access and ample storage space. | 15.6-inch Full HD display for clear and comfortable viewing. | Long-lasting battery life up to 10 hours for all-day productivity. | Technical Specifications | Detailed technical specifications of the laptop model. | Model: LX-5500 | Processor: Intel Core i7-1165G7
Background requirement: keep contrast restrained, preserve a safe text area, and support light foreground content.
Do not include watermarks, logos, unreadable text, UI chrome, or accidental text overlays.

interactions.description: User clicks 'View Product Details' button to navigate to the Product Features section.
User clicks 'Compare Models' button to navigate to the Technical Specifications section for model comparison.
User clicks 'Add to Cart' button to add the current laptop model to the shopping cart.
User clicks 'Contact Customer Service' button to open customer service contact options.

notes: The layout is simple and modern as requested.
Use brand colors for the color scheme.
Content includes main laptop introduction with two main sections: product features and technical specifications.
A single vertical section layout is suitable for clear presentation of these two main content sections.

notes: This element plan introduces a laptop product page targeting office workers with sections for product features and technical specifications.
Includes user action buttons in a sidebar for common interactions like viewing details, comparing models, adding to cart, and contacting support.
Layout and style are assumed simple and modern with brand color scheme.

interactions.description: User clicks 'View Product Details' button to navigate to the Product Features section.
User clicks 'Compare Models' button to navigate to the Technical Specifications section for model comparison.
User clicks 'Add to Cart' button to add the current laptop model to the shopping cart.
User clicks 'Contact Customer Service' button to open customer service contact options.

notes: Navigation is via sidebar navigation as per confirmed intent.
Interactions correspond to user actions: view product details, compare models, add to cart, contact support.
Use a simple and modern layout style with brand colors for a professional and clean look.
Theme enterprise_light with quiet tone to support operational and informational clarity.
Page container holds all content sections.
Sections divide content logically: product features, technical specifications, and user actions sidebar.
Stacks organize lists vertically within sections for clarity.
Headings and subheadings highlight titles and section headers.
Body text used for descriptive and specification details for readability.
Primary and secondary action buttons distinguish main and secondary user actions.
Consistent use of brand colors and quiet tone ensures a professional, non-distracting user experience.
